description: Gantt Ejecutivo PM para Power BI Deneb. Versión ajustada con agrupadores en escala de grises para reducir competencia visual con tareas, hitos y barras de avance. Prioridades con mayor contraste visual. Incluye tooltip en Gantt, hover de fila y capas de sombreado no interactivas para no bloquear tooltips.

signals.name: height
signals.update: data('yScale').length > 0 ? min(pbiContainerHeight-70, data('yScale').length * yRowHeight + max(2, yPaddingInner/2)) : 0

signals.name: initDate
signals.description: The initial date shown in the Gantt. Can be either 'today' or 'project'

signals.name: activeTimeButton
signals.description: Controla el botón activo de escala temporal sin depender del ancho de días/meses.

signals.name: yRowPadding
signals.description: Row padding as % of yRowHeight (each side)

on.update: span(xDomPre)<xDomMinSpan?[anchor + (xDom[0] - anchor) * (zoom*(xDomMinSpan/span(xDomPre))), anchor + (xDom[1] - anchor) * (zoom*(xDomMinSpan/span(xDomPre)))]:span(xDomPre)>xDomMaxSpan?[anchor + (xDom[0] - anchor) * (zoom*(xDomMaxSpan/span(xDomPre))), anchor + (xDom[1] - anchor) * (zoom*(xDomMaxSpan/span(xDomPre)))] :xDomPre
[xCur[0] + span(xCur) * delta[0] / width, xCur[1] + span(xCur) * delta[0] / width]

clampRange( [yCur[0] + span(yCur) * delta[1] / max(1,scaledHeight), yCur[1] + span(yCur) * delta[1] / max(1,scaledHeight)],height>=scaledHeight?0: height-scaledHeight,height>=scaledHeight?height:scaledHeight)
yCur[0]==yRange[0] && yCur[1]==yRange[1]&& xCur[0]===xDom[0]&& xCur[1]===xDom[1] && datum.phase==datum.task?  {phase: datum.phase}:null
yCur[0]==yRange[0] && yCur[1]==yRange[1]&& xCur[0]===xDom[0]&& xCur[1]===xDom[1] && datum.datum.phase==datum.datum.task?  {phase: datum.datum.phase}:null

transform.expr: isValid(datum.planificado) ? datum.planificado : isValid(datum.avance_planificado) ? datum.avance_planificado : isValid(datum['avance planificado']) ? datum['avance planificado'] : isValid(datum.porc_planificado) ? datum.porc_planificado : isValid(datum['% planificado']) ? datum['% planificado'] : null
isValid(datum.estado) && datum.estado!='' ? datum.estado : (datum.completion>=100 ? 'Completado' : datum.completion>0 ? 'En ejecución' : 'No iniciado')

'M ' + scale('x', datum.start)+' '  + (scale('y', datum.id)+yPaddingInner) + ' H ' +  scale('x', datum.end)+' ' + ' v ' +  phaseSymbolHeight + ' L ' +  (scale('x', datum.end) - phaseSymbolWidth) +' ' + (scale('y', datum.id)+yPaddingInner+phaseSymbolHeight/2 ) + ' L ' + (scale('x', datum.start)+phaseSymbolWidth) + ' ' + (scale('y', datum.id)+yPaddingInner+phaseSymbolHeight/2) + ' L ' + (scale('x', datum.start)) + ' ' + (scale('y', datum.id)+ yPaddingInner+phaseSymbolHeight) + ' z'

datum.milestone == null || datum.milestone == false?scale('x',datum.start)- sqrt(arrowSymbolSize) - 1:(scale('x',datum.start) +(dayBandwidth/2) - (sqrt(milestoneSymbolSize)/2) - sqrt(arrowSymbolSize)) - 1

marks.name: taskLabelSizes
marks.description: Hidden label sizes to support tooltips when the task name doesn't completely fit

marks.name: taskTooltips
marks.description: Hidden rect to support tooltips when the task name doesn't completely fit

marks.name: tableHoverRows
marks.description: Resalta la fila de la tabla al pasar el puntero sobre la tabla o elementos del Gantt.

shape.signal: datum.isProject ? '' : datum.phase == datum.task && !indata('collapsedPhases', 'phase', datum.phase)?'triangle-down':datum.phase == datum.task && indata('collapsedPhases', 'phase', datum.phase)?'triangle-right':''

marks.name: plannedProgressLine
marks.description: Línea vertical punteada que indica el % planificado dentro de la columna Avance.

marks.name: ganttHoverRows
marks.description: Resalta la fila completa del Gantt cuando el usuario pasa el puntero sobre la tabla o un elemento del Gantt.

marks.name: ganttHoverCapture
marks.description: Capa transparente para activar el hover al pasar por cualquier zona vacía de una fila del Gantt, sin mostrar tooltip.

text.signal: datum.isProject ? 'Proyecto completo ('+datum.days+' d)' : datum.milestone?datum.task:datum.task && datum.assignee? datum.task + ' ('+ datum.days+' d'+')' +' - ' + datum.assignee:datum.task + ' ('+ datum.days+' d'+')'

marks.name: taskBars
marks.description: The task bars (serve as an outline for percent complete)

fill.signal: datum.id == itemHovered.id || indexof(itemHovered.dependencies,datum.id)>-1 ? merge(hsl(scale('cLight', datum.phase)), {l:0.68}) : scale('cLight', datum.phase)

stroke.signal: datum.id == itemHovered.id || indexof(itemHovered.dependencies,datum.id)>-1 ? merge(hsl(scale('cDark', datum.phase)), {l:0.35}) : scale('cDark', datum.phase)

tooltip.signal: showTooltips&&down==null ? (datum.isProject ? {'📌 Tipo':'Proyecto','Proyecto':datum.task,'Estado':datum.stateLabel,'Inicio':timeFormat(datum.start,'%d/%m/%Y'),'Fin':timeFormat(datum.labelEnd,'%d/%m/%Y'),'Duración total':datum.days+' días','Avance real promedio':datum.completion+'%'} : {'📌 Tipo':'Fase','Fase':datum.phase,'Estado':datum.stateLabel,'Inicio':timeFormat(datum.start,'%d/%m/%Y'),'Fin':timeFormat(datum.labelEnd,'%d/%m/%Y'),'Duración':datum.days+' días','Avance real promedio':datum.completion+'%'}) : null

marks.name: phaseGroup
marks.description: Group to hold the x y coordinates for the SVG clipping fills

marks.name: phaseFills
marks.description: Percent complete for each phase. Clipping path signal has to be here as it fails to update on zoom when coming from a dataset. The only value available in the clipping path signal is parent!

path.signal: 'M 0 0'  + ' L ' +   (scale('x', parent.end) - scale('x', parent.start)) +' 0'    + ' v ' +  phaseSymbolHeight + ' L ' + (scale('x', parent.end) - scale('x', parent.start) - phaseSymbolWidth) +' '  +   (phaseSymbolHeight/2) + ' H ' +  phaseSymbolWidth + ' L 0 '   +   phaseSymbolHeight + ' z'

stroke.signal: datum.id == itemHovered.id ? merge(hsl(scale('cDark', datum.phase)), {l:0.22}) : scale('cDark', datum.phase)

marks.name: taskSelector
marks.description: Hidden rect to support phase expand and collapse
